# Formatted Document: team/index.qmd
---
title: Team
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: current-team
    contents: profiles
    include:
      categories: ["Current"]
    type: grid
  - id: alumni-team
    contents: profiles
    include:
      categories: ["Alumni"]
    type: grid
---

## Current Members

::: {#current-team}
:::

## Alumni

::: {#alumni-team}
:::
